title: Add and verify R1 Neo puck overlay after puck CRC link fix
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-ev5b.4. A provisional R1 Neo puck overlay reached compile but lichen/apps/puck failed link with undefined crc32_ieee despite the app-level CRC intent. The MVP board target is gateway/L2/BLE, so do not land the unverified puck overlay in ev5b.4. Fix the puck CRC dependency, add the R1 Neo puck board files back, and verify west build -b r1_neo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck.
